title: SLO Control-Chain Decision
description: Governed machine-readable artifact produced by the Control-Chain Orchestrator (BN.4). Records the full evaluation → enforcement → gating chain and the final continuation eligibility decision for a pipeline stage.

control_chain_decision_id.description: Unique identifier for this control-chain decision.

artifact_id.description: Identifier of the artifact that was evaluated.

stage.description: Pipeline stage for which the control chain was run. '(unknown)' when indeterminate.

input_kind.description: Kind of input that triggered this control-chain run.

enforcement_decision_id.description: Identifier of the enforcement decision produced or consumed by this chain. '(none)' when not applicable.

gating_decision_id.description: Identifier of the gating decision produced or consumed by this chain. '(none)' when gating was not executed.

enforcement_policy.description: Named enforcement policy profile used in this chain. '(unknown)' when indeterminate.

enforcement_decision_status.description: Decision status from the enforcement step. '(unknown)' when not determinable.

gating_outcome.description: Stage-aware gating outcome from the gating step. '(none)' when gating was not executed.

continuation_allowed.description: True when the full control chain permits the stage to continue; false otherwise.

blocking_layer.description: Layer that blocked continuation, or 'none' when allowed.

primary_reason_code.description: Machine-readable code identifying the primary reason for the control-chain decision.

traceability_integrity_sli.description: The traceability_integrity SLI value. Null when not determinable.

lineage_validation_mode.description: Lineage validation mode from the enforcement step.

lineage_defaulted.description: True when lineage fields were populated via fail-safe defaults. Null when not determinable.

lineage_valid.description: Whether the artifact lineage was validated without errors. Null when not determinable.

warnings.description: Human-readable warning messages accumulated during control-chain evaluation.

errors.description: Human-readable error messages accumulated during control-chain evaluation.

recommended_action.description: Machine-readable recommended action derived from the control-chain decision.

evaluated_at.description: ISO 8601 date-time when this control-chain decision was generated.

stage_source.description: Whether the stage was taken from the artifact ('original') or overridden by the caller ('override').
